---
title: "ACS Derived Estimates"
format:
  html:
    date: today
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
---


# Module structure and logic

Brief description of steps, functions, inputs and outputs of `acsest.R`.



# Example usage

Census API key needs to be stored in environmental variable `CENSUS_API_KEY`.

```{r}

source("acsest.R", local = (acsest <- new.env()))

# read in a set of estimate formulas
sheet <- acsest$fread("path/to/estimate_specs.csv")

# retrieve and save raw ACS data
wi_acs <- acsest$acsdata(sheet[, formula], level = levels, endyear = 2022) 
levels <- c("state", "county")
saveRDS(wi_acs, file = "wi_acs.rds")

# calculate estimates from data and formula specs
out <- acsest$sumacs(formula = sheet[, formula], varname= sheet[, myfield], method = sheet[, type], level = levels, one.zero = TRUE, data = wi_acs, file = "output.csv")

```
